button.name: action_jo_close
button.confirm: Close this Job Order? Ensure all work, materials, and claims are fully recorded.

button.name: action_populate_resources
button.confirm: Populate planned material lines from the BOQ template? Existing lines will be preserved.

button.name: action_request_materials
button.confirm: Request all planned materials? This will create a stock transfer request.

div.title: Open: Claims / Extracts
div.div: Financial extraction based on approved quantities

page.name: stages_tab
page.div: Stage Flow: New → Approved → In Progress → Under Inspection → Accepted → Ready for Claim → Claimed → Closed

page.name: execution_tab
page.div: 100% Reached. Click Request Inspection in the header to proceed to inspection.
Over-executed. Executed quantity exceeds planned (contract) quantity. Review before proceeding.

button.name: action_sync_progress_from_logs
button.confirm: Re-sync Executed Qty from the sum of all progress log increments?

field.name: tool_notes
field.placeholder: List tools required or deployed on site…

field.name: subcontractor_notes
field.placeholder: Subcontractor name, scope of work, notes…

field.name: control_device_notes
field.placeholder: Control devices, instruments, sensors, monitoring equipment…

field.name: instruction_notes
field.placeholder: Work instructions, method statements, safety notes…

field.name: help
field.p: Open an approved BOQ Analysis document and click Generate Job Orders to create execution records from approved analysis lines.
